objective:
Objectif : Générer un modèle de trading à l'aide d'indicateurs non conventionnels pour le marché 0GUSDC en 1h afin de trouver des moments opportuns pour la stratégie de breakout, de mean reversion et de momentum.

Les entrées seraient les combinaisons d'indicators suivants : AROON + EMA + MACD, avec conditions telles que l'AROUN (34) est plus grand que le niveau 50 pour indiquer un trend actif et la MACD(12,26,9) montre une convergence/divergence positive.

Les sorties seraient les moments où la stratégie se met en place avec Stop Loss (SL) à -3% de l'achat et Take Profit (TP) à +7%, tandis que le risque management est garanti par un stop perdu (SL) à -10%.

Cela pourrait donc être une stratégie intéressante à tester, en particulier avec les filtres d'horaire et de liquidité ajoutés afin de prendre en compte le comportement aleatoire du marché. Il serait important de vérifier la validité de cette hypothèse en testant diffé

iterations.hypothesis: Combining Bollinger Bands and ATR with a trend-following indicator (ADX) can help identify breakouts in trending markets while reducing the impact of whipsaws. The strategy enters long when the price breaks above the upper Bollinger band, RSI is over 50, and ADX is above 25. Exit rules include stop loss at -3% below entry with take profit at +7%. Risk management uses ATR to calculate stop-loss and take-profit levels.
The combination of RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR will improve the trading strategy by identifying trend changes, mean reversion and momentum swings.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy combines RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR to identify trend changes, mean reversion and momentum swings. The entry long condition is based on close price being above the upper bollinger band and both RSI > 50 AND ADX > 25. Exit conditions are when the close crosses the middle bollinger band or ADX < 20. A risk management plan with a stop loss of -3% to TP +7% is implemented with an additional stop lost at -10%. The backtest is currently running and results have not been seen yet.
[Backup plan] If the strategy performs poorly (negative return) then I would consider adjusting the entry conditions. For example, changing the RSI > 50 to a different threshold or adding another indicator for entering trades such as ATR bands. If performance is mediocre (low Sharpe ratio), adjustments could be made to risk management plan by altering stop loss and take profit levels. Alternative approaches could include trying other non-conventional indicators or incorporating machine learning techniques.

iterations.hypothesis:
The combination of ATR based stop loss, mean reversion and momentum trading strategy can enhance the performance in trending markets.
Stop Loss Guaranteed by ATR with 1.5x below entry & Take Profit assured by 3x above entry.
